Throbbing headache in one-half of the brain. Inclined to bend head backward. Hot, clammy sweat on forehead and scalp

Intoxication and staggering, on getting up in the morning. Vertigo, with fainting. Vertigo, with obscuration of the eyes. Vertigo chiefly in the morning, or in the evening, or after a meal, or after taking coffee. Headache on waking in the morning, or while asleep, sometimes with a sensation as if the head were going to burst. Pain as if caused by a bruise, and pressive heaviness in the head. Pullings, shootings, and beatings in the head, often only semi-lateral, with one red cheek; worse at night; in the open air; in the wind; better from warm coverings and when walking about. Cracking in one side of the brain. Hot, clammy sweat on the forehead, and on the scalp. Starting pain in the forehead, chiefly after a meal.

Heaviness, dulness, pressure, constriction, or burning in forehead. Tearing headache in forehead, with sensation as if a lump was falling forward, while sitting, or turning over in bed. Recurrent, paroxysmal, tearing headache in forehead. Sticking-tearing headache in forehead, which extends into chest. Jerking headache in forehead, especially after eating. Pressive pain in both temples, like from strong pressure with thumbs, forenoon. Pressure, extending from vertex to forehead and temples ; < when thinking of it, from sudden stooping, or from mental exertion. Pressing headache as from a stone in forehead, hot head, < evenings. Headache, especially in temples ; a pressure as from firm pressure with fingers. Tearing pain in temples. Tearing and stinging pain in left side, particularly in temple, and in and around eye. Stitches in temples. Tearing headache, with heaviness of head, < about noon, after vexation, or an error in diet. Violent stinging pains in left side of head, from occiput to upper jaw, after vexation. Pressure increasing and decreasing, especially in right half of forehead and in right temple, where are also felt very frequent dull stitches, which sometimes extend to occiput like electric sparks. Pressing and burrowing headache, especially in forehead and temples. Tearing and sticking, extending outward to temples. Wandering pains in temples, frequently recurring, and always < at beginning. Pressure and pressing from vertex extending over forehead and temples, < as soon as attention was directed to it, and by sudden stooping, or by mental exertion, as when reflecting or even reading. Throbbing headache. Stitches through head, from hard palate to vertex. Headache like needle-stitches, as if eyes would fall out of head. Transient attacks of throbbing in one-half of brain. One-sided drawing headache. Sensation of compression of brain, or as from constriction of meninges. Heaviness in head : with dulness ; with pain in temples ; particularly in occiput on waking in morning ; with drawing forward of head ; with bruised sensation. Confusion of head : with disinclination for mental work ; with inclination to bend it backward ; with sticking and boring, especially in right temple, in morning ; with pressure in paroxysms, during afternoon, particularly on walking. Congestion to head : following anger ; with pressure while lying down ; on vertex ; with heat in face and oppression of chest ; with stitches in head and chest. Pain in head, as if it would burst, on waking from sleep. She has intense headache on top of head, as from pressure from within, and feeling as if top of head was blown off ; t. Sensation of fulness and heat in head. Headache : felt even during sleep ; in morning in bed ; with vertigo ; after eating ; at night. Megrim. Swelling of temples, with painfulness to touch. Rheumatic pain in head. θ Dysentery. Inclined to bend head backward. Moves her head backward and forward. Warm sweat on head, wetting hair. Hot, sticky sweat covering forehead and hairy scalp. Feeling as if hair stood on end, with shivering. θ Gastro-bilious fever.

nose.text: NOSE. ► Objective and Discharges. ► Ulcerated nostrils, sore nose, [1] . ► Must often sneeze, [17] . ► Frequent sneezing, and a sensation as though a coryza would ensue (second day after 5 drops), [11] . ► Frequent violent sneezing, with crawling in the nose; some drops of clear blood had been discharged from the nose during the afternoon (third day after 60 drops), [11] . ► Evening, suddenly, repeated sneezing (second day), [17] . ► *Coryza, from five to eight days (after two hours), [1] . ► Thin fluent coryza; watery mucus drops from nose; disappeared in three hours (second day), [17] . ► Nose-bleed, [1] . [330.] ► Discharge of a few drops of bright-red blood from the nose, which relieved the confusion of the head and the abnormal sensations in the nose (second day after 60 drops), [11] . ► Epistaxis after rising and washing, which immediately relieved the confusion of the head and stoppage of the nose (second morning after 10 drops), [11] . ► Epistaxis from the right nostril, with relief of the inflammation in the left wing of the nose, and complete relief of the head (third day after 5 drops), [11] . ► Stoppage of the nose, with rush of blood to it (fourth day after 5 drops), [11] . ► Stoppage of the nose, with heat in it, as if coryza would ensue (eighth day after 60 drops), [11] . ► Violent stoppage of the nose, with sensation as if he would have nose-bleed, lasting half an hour (soon after taking), [8] . ► Stopped nose, like a stopped coryza (after one hour), [1] . ► Stopped nose, like a stopped coryza, with mucous discharge from the nose, [1] . ► Subjective. ► Increased sensation in the nose, as if coryza or epistaxis would occur (second day after 20 drops), [11] . ► *Irritation to sneeze, with crawling and dry heat and stopped sensation in the nose, with a sensation as if coryza would appear, also with pressure in the forehead (second day after 5 drops), [11] . [340.] ► Dryness and sensation of fulness in the nose, soon followed by nose-bleed (twelfth day after 60 drops), [11] . ► Dryness and stopped sensation in the nose returns, with sensation as though the nose would bleed (soon), [8] . ► Nose somewhat dry and stopped, with tension and sensation of heaviness in it (second morning after 20 drops), [11] . ► Feeling of dryness, heat, and fulness in the nose (second day after 60 drops), [11] . ► Sensation of great dryness and fulness in the nose (soon after 60 drops), [11] . ► A transient sensation of great dryness and burning in the nose (third day), [11] . ► Constant great sensation of dryness of the mucous membrane of the nose, and on the border of the left wing of the nose a painful sensation to touch, as if a pustule would develop (thirty-five minutes after 5 drops), [11] . ► Fulness, with some crawling in the nose and some lachrymation (after 5 drops), [11] . ► Transient sensation of fulness in the nose, with sensation as if it would bleed (third morning), [8] . ► Crawling in the nose, provoking sneezing (ten minutes after 5 drops), [11] . [350.] ► Pressive stitches in the nasal bones (second day after 60 drops), [11] . ► Crawling in the nose (second day), [17] . ► *Crawling in the nose until the eye waters , [10] . ► Severe crawling in the right nostril, as if coryza would follow, at 10 A.M. (second day), [10] . ► Excessive crawling and a sensation of fulness in the nose during the whole forenoon (second day after 5 drops), [11] . ► Smell. ► Extremely sensitive to all smells , [1] . ► Beer seems to smell offensive, [1] .
Sensitive to all smells. Coryza, with inability to sleep
Wrinkled skin of the nose. Coryza, with obstruction of the nose. Ulceration and inflammation of the nostrils. Epistaxis. Coagulated blood from nose; viscid nasal secretion. Very acute smell.

Extremely sensitive to all odors. Nosebleed, relieving confusion of head. Bleeding, coagulated or dark blood. θ Epistaxis. Irritation to sneeze, with crawling, dry heat and stopped up sensation in nose ; feeling as if coryza would appear ; also with pressure in forehead. Coryza : fluent, watery ; viscid ; acrid ; with loss of smell ; with dry hacking cough. Catarrh, with dry, fatiguing cough, painful bruised feeling in umbilical region, painfully sensitive to touch, and < at night. θ Dentition. Stoppage of nose. Dryness and sensation of fulness and heaviness in nose, followed by nosebleed. Catarrhs, with ulcerated nostrils and chapped lips, one cheek pale, the other red, with chills and thirst. Crawling in nose until eye waters.

face.text: FACE. ► Puffiness of the face and hands, [1] . ► *Burning in the face (thirty minutes after 40 drops), [11] . ► Cheeks. ►► *Redness of one cheek , returning in paroxysms, without shivering or internal heat (after four and twelve hours), [1] . ► Lips. [360.] ► *Lips crack and peel (after sixteen hours), [1] . ► Dry lips, [12] . ► At night, the lips become dry and stick together, without thirst, [1] . ► Jaws. ► Heaviness in the jaws, with slight burrowing in the alveoli (sixth day after 60 drops), [11] . ► Sensation of heaviness in the lower jaw returns about 1 P.M. (third day), [11] . ► Pain on opening the jaws, as if the masseter muscles were painfully cramped, which pain also extended into the teeth, [1] . ► *Stitches in the right joint of the jaw, extending into the upper back teeth, severe but transient , [10] . ► Single stitches in the jaw, extending into the inner ear , [1] . ► Feeling of weakness in the muscles of mastication, with inclination to hold the mouth open, with increased accumulation of saliva (third day), [11] .

One cheek red and hot; the other pale and cold. Stitches in jaw extending to inner ear and teeth. Teeth ache worse after warm drink; worse, coffee, at night. Drives to distraction. Jerking of tongue and facial muscles. Distress of teething children (Calc phos; Terebinth)

Face hot, red, burning or redness and heat of one cheek, with coldness and paleness of the other; or face pale, hollow, with distortion of features from pain. Heat of the face, while the rest of the body is cold. Swelling of the face. Erysipelas in the face, with hard and bluish swelling of one cheek. Swelling of one temple, with pain on being touched. Shooting, drawing, and pulsative pains in one side of the face. Red miliary eruption on the cheeks. Yellow colour of the skin on the face. Convulsive movements of the muscles of the face and of the lips. Lips cracked, excoriated, and ulcerated. Spasms in the jaws, with compression of the teeth. Wrinkles on the forehead.

Convulsive movements and twitching of facial muscles and lips. Neuralgia of face, pain causes hot sweat about head and extorts screams ; stinging pain extending to upper jaw, from occiput, left side. Burning in face. Hot face, with redness of cheeks. Redness of one cheek, returning in paroxysms, without shivering or internal heat. θ Hemicrania. Forehead hot, but moist. θ Otalgia. Wrinkled forehead. Red face, or redness and heat of one (l.) cheek, the other being pale. Face pale, sunken, distorted by pain. Yellow or bloated face. One cheek red and hot, the other pale and cold. Heat of face, while rest of body is cool. Paleness of face, with cold cheeks. Face sweats after eating or drinking. Puffiness of face and cheeks. Fiery red rash on face. Ophthalmia scrofulosa. Facial erysipelas after toothache. Skin of forehead wrinkled above nose. Swelling, hardness and blueness of one cheek. θ Neuralgia. One-sided swelling of cheek, generally left. Erysipelas, starting on left cheek, near nose, gradually spreading over face and head. Stitches in joint of right jaw, extending into upper back teeth, severe but transient. Exanthema on face. Child draws mouth back and forth, or from side to side. θ Teething. θ Convulsions. Single stitches in jaw, extending into inner ear. Lips crack and peel ; rhagades in middle of lower lip. At night, lips become dry and stick together, without thirst. Swelling of submaxillary glands. θ Toothache. θ Facial erysipelas. Sensation of heaviness in lower jaw. Pain on opening jaws, as if masseter muscles were painfully ; cramped, which pain also extended into teeth. Feeling of weakness in muscles of mastication, with inclination to hold mouth open, and increased saliva.

mouth.text: MOUTH. ► Teeth. ► Looseness of the teeth, [1] . [370.] ► Teeth covered with mucus, [1] . ► Wakened at 3 A.M. by toothache (a corroding pain, as if something scratched the nerve), which ceased about 7 o'clock, so that only a few jerklike stitches remained, [1] . ► Toothache occurs during the forenoon, and lasts all day (third day), [7] . ► *Toothache as from taking cold, if one exposes himself to the cold air when sweating , [1] . ► Toothache while eating, [14] . ► *Toothache while eating, and for some time afterwards , [14] . ► *Toothache after eating and drinking, though nothing warm nor cold was taken (later), [1] . ► *After eating and drinking, especially something warm (though also after cold things), toothache reappears immediately or after a minute , [1] . ► Toothache, even when not eating, in the left lower canine tooth and in the incisor next to it, aggravated by touching the tooth with the tongue, [14] . ► *Toothache if anything warm is taken into the mouth , [1] . [380.] ►► *Toothache, especially severe after a warm drink , particularly coffee , [1] . ► (Toothache is renewed in a warm room), [1] . ► Toothache, with swelling of the cheek, [1] . [The toothache which Chamomilla causes is very similar to that so frequently produced by drinking coffee; the latter is therefore homopathically and specifically cured by small doses of Chamomilla. -H.] ► Toothache recurring in intermittent attacks, with swelling of the cheeks and accumulation of saliva; the pains shoot back and forth, even extending to the eye, and are aggravated by drinking cold water, [1] . ► Violent toothache in a left upper diseased back tooth during breakfast, [14] . ► *Violent toothache in the left upper jaw, every time after eating warm food , [13] . ► *Drawing toothache (without being able to locate it in any tooth); it disappears during eating, but especially rages at night, therewith the teeth feel too long , [1] . [It is a peculiarity of Chamomilla pains generally that they are worse at night, when they frequently drive one to the border of distraction , not infrequently with unquenchable thirst and redness of the cheeks; also with hot sweat on the head even in the hair . The pains of Chamomilla generally seem intolerable, and not be endured . All these characteristies of Chamomilla show how similar diseased conditions may be removed homopathically by it. -H.] ► Drawing toothache in the lower jaw, extending forward (after half an hour), [1] . ► Grumbling-drawing toothache in the jaw, [1] . ► Pressive toothache in the alveoli of the right upper jaw, [9] . [390.] ► Tearing toothache, which extends to the ear, with swelling of the cheek, [1] . ► Pain in a left upper hollow back tooth, less during dinner, but more during supper (third day), [14] . ► Sensation in the upper back teeth as if they were too heavy and dragged downward (thirty-five minutes after 20 drops), [11] . ► Grumbling and crawling in the teeth of the upper jaw, [1] . ► Sensation of distension and heaviness in the roots of the upper back teeth on both sides (second morning after 10 drops), [11] . ► Boring and digging pains in the teeth on waking in the morning (after 5 drops), [11] . ► Boring and digging in the roots of some of the back teeth, especially in the hollow ones; cold water relieves this sensation for the moment, but is soon returns more severe than ever (fifteen minutes after 5 drops), [11] . ► Long-continued dull digging and boring in the roots of some of the back teeth, [11] . ► Drawing pain in the teeth, [1] . ► *Drawing pain in the teeth after eating and drinking , [1] . [400.] ► Pressure upon the canine tooth and first back tooth of the left side above and below caused pain (fourth day), [14] . ► Very transient pressure and pressing-asunder pain in the teeth (soon), [8] . ► Slight transient pressive pain in the second and third back teeth in the afternoon, [8] . ► Stitches in some of the lower teeth in the morning (after 40 drops), [11] . ► Severe stitches in the roots of the three back teeth of the left upper jaw (nine hours after 60 drops), [11] . ► Evenings, tearing pain in teeth, worse from tea, and continued so as to disturb sleep, with restlessness and heat in face, [17] . ► *Teeth sensitive to touch, especially some hollow back teeth (ninth day after 60 drops), [11] . ► Teeth very sensitive to touch, especially some hollow teeth of the upper jaw, with heaviness in the alveoli, etc. (seventh day after 60 drops), [11] . ► Throbbing pain in the second and third right lower back teeth, aggravated by pressure, and momentarily relieved by cold water (second day after 60 drops), [11] . ► Throbbing in the roots of some of the back teeth, especially in the right upper jaw, and pain in some of the teeth when touched (fourth day after 60 drops), [11] . [410.] ► The prover remarks that the first left upper tricuspid is hollow, that he had pain in it nine months ago, but only while eating, and then only if some food got into it, and these pains have increased during the proving of Chamomilla; he farther remarks that since his earliest recollection he has bad much sweat on the feet, and four or five years ago he had much pain in his throat, [14] . ► Gums and Alveoli. ► Swelling of the gum, [1] . ► Swelling of the gum, with increased tension; pressure upon it causes a pricking as with needles; this he had had frequently before, but never to such a degree, [9] . ► Swollen gum, with tension, sticking and violent pulsation of the alveoli of the upper and lower jaws, especially of the lower, and particularly in the region of the right angle, with severe pressure and sensation of pain, [3] . ► *Sensation as if the gum were swelling about some of the back teeth (fifteen minutes after 5 drops), [11] . ► Heaviness in the lower alveoli, with dull stitches and pressure in some of the back teeth of the right side of the lower jaw (thirty minutes after 10 drops), [11] . ► Heaviness in the lower alveoli, especially in the last back teeth, with dull digging sensation in the roots of the lower back teeth of both sides (third day), [11] . ► Great heaviness in the alveoli; they feel as if filled with lead (fifteen minutes after 5 drops), [11] . ► Great heaviness in the alveoli, with pressive pain, digging, and pressure in some of the back teeth, especially of the lower jaw (soon after 60 drops), [11] . ► *Sensation of fulness and heaviness in the alveoli of the first and second back teeth of both sides of the upper jaw, with a slight burrowing and boring in their roots, with a sensation as if the alveoli were distended and formed a hard, tense swelling (second day after 5 drops), [11] . [420.] ► *A slight burrowing and sensation of heaviness in the alveoli of some of the back teeth ; " this sensation seems intolerable, and makes him very peevish " (third day after 5 drops), [11] . ► Pressure in the alveoli of the upper back teeth (thirty-five minutes after 20 drops), [11] . ► Pressure and heaviness in the alveoli of the upper and lower jaws, as if they were filled with lead, especially noticed in the lower jaw, where it seems to start from the anterior foramen (mental foramen), towards 6 P.M., [9] . ► Pressure and sensation as of something heavy in the alveoli of the upper jaw, especially on the right side; the teeth feel as though filled with lead, [7] . ► Long-continued pressure and sensation of heaviness in the upper and lower alveoli, [11] . ► Continued slight pressure in the alveoli of the upper second and third back teeth of each side, extending up to beneath the eyes (fourth day), [7] . ► Tensive pressing asunder and sensation of pressure in the upper alveoli, especially involving the second and third back teeth, continued the second day, [7] . ► Pressive pain and a feeling as if distended by wind in the alveoli of the second and third back teeth on both sides of the upper jaw; this sensation was persistent, with frequent intermissions, and extended deep into the malar bone; it was especially noticed in the right side, [7] . ► Some indications of the pressive pain in the alveoli of the upper second and third back teeth (first day), [8] . ► Stitches in the alveoli of the upper and lower jaws (forty minutes after 40 drops), [11] . [430.] ► Throbbing and sensation of heat in the alveoli and gum of the upper back teeth, and afterwards also about the lower jaw; boring and digging in the roots of the teeth, only momentarily relieved by cold water, at 9 A.M. (third day after 5 drops), [11] . ► Tongue. ► Red tongue, [2] . ► *Furred tongue, [22] . ► Yellow, furred tongue (16 to 20 grains), [21] . ► *Tongue coated dirty-white, [11] . ► *Tongue coated yellow, [18] . ► Tongue slimy-coated, without changed taste and without want of appetite (second day), [17] . ► Blisters on and beneath the tongue, with stinging pain , [1] . ► *Tongue dry, [17] . ► The tongue is dry, with thirst for water, loss of appetite, flushes of heat, sweat of the face and palpitation, followed by unnatural hunger, [1] . [440.] ► Severe biting on the back of the tongue and on the roof of the palate (after one hour), [1] . ► General Mouth. ► Offensive odor from the mouth after dinner, like a foul breath (after three hours), [1] . ► Dryness of the mouth in the morning, followed by distension of the abdomen and imperfect evacuation, [1] . ► Dryness and bitter-tasting mucus in the mouth in the morning (after 5 drops), [11] . ► Toward noon, sensitive scraping-burning in back of mouth, [17] . ► Spasmodic drawing pain in the palate, extending into the fauces, [1] . ► Severe tickling in the hard palate (nine hours after 60 drops), [11] . ► Pressure in the salivary glands, with increased secretion of saliva (second day after 60 drops), [11] . ► Pressure and dull stitches in the salivary glands with pressure and increased secretion of saliva (sixth day after 60 drops), [11] . ► Stitches and pressive sensation in the salivary glands, especially a sensation of swelling in the tonsils (ninth day after 60 drops), [11] . ► Saliva. [450.] ► Secretion of saliva increased, [11] . ► Increased secretion of saliva (eleventh day after 60 drops), [11] . ► Increased secretion of saliva, with a sensation of pressure in the salivary glands (second day after 20 drops), [11] . ► Increased secretion of saliva soon after supper, with a peculiar sweetish metallic taste, [9] . ► Profuse secretion of tough saliva (ten minutes after 40 drops), [11] . ► *Collection of metallic sweetish saliva in the mouth (second day), [9] . ► Great accumulation of metallic-tasting saliva, [10] . ► The saliva was especially copious half an hour after supper, and had a sweetish metallic taste, [9] . ► *Salivation , [1] . ► Taste. ► Slimy taste (after two and twelve hours), [1] . [460.] ► (At night, an offensive taste in the mouth), [1] . ► Sour taste (after three and eighteen hours), [1] . ► Bitter taste in the mouth (second day), [9] . ► *Bitter taste in the mouth in the morning (after twenty-four hours), [1] . ► Bitter aromatic taste, [22] . ► Taste fatty, unpleasant, with irritation to vomit (soon), [8] . ► An unpleasant fatty taste in the mouth, with increased secretion of saliva, [11] . ► Disgusting taste of the drug (8 to 14 grains), [21] . ► *Everything tastes like old rancid fat (after two hours), [1] . ► Bread tastes sour, [1] . >>>>> Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Cham.

stomach.text: STOMACH. ► Appetite. ► Unnatural hunger in the evening (after three hours), [1] . ► (Desire for sourkrout), [1] . ► Appetite lessened (12 grains), [21] . ► Appetite diminished, with pressure and tension in the stomach, and some nausea, which was relieved by eating (second day after 5 drops), [11] . ► The appetite was diminished from large doses of Chamomilla, but after the third day after 60 drops it began to improve, [11] . ► Diminished appetite (tenth day), [14] . [520.] ► Diminished appetite (16 to 20 grains), [21] . ► Diminished appetite and eructations, [22] . ► Loss of appetite, [1] . ► Loss of appetite, as though the food sickened him, although it has no unnatural taste, [1] . ► Loss of appetite, but after eating the appetite returns, [1] . ► No appetite, [1] . ► He has no appetite, and relishes nothing; the food will not go down, [1] . ► No longing for food; nothing tastes good, [1] . ► Disgust, [22] . ► Disgust at food (22 and 24 grains), [21] . [530.] ► When food is set before him it makes him shudder, it is so repugnant, [1] . ► Especial aversion to animal food (second day after 5 drops), [11] . ► (Aversion to broth), [1] . ► Thirst. ► Thirst , [17] , [22] . ► Thirst increased (second day after 5 drops), [11] . ► Thirst decidedly increased during the day, [7] . ► Thirst in the evening, and waking at night on account of pain, [1] . ► Thirst, with febrile heat and redness of the cheeks, [1] . ► Some thirst (third day), [11] . ► Much thirst (thirtieth day), [14] . [540.] ► Excessive thirst, [2] . ► Unquenchable thirst, with dryness of the tongue (after five hours), [1] . ► Great longing for coffee (after seven hours), [1] . [This seems to be a reaction from S. 128. -H.] ► Aversion to coffee, [1] . ► Eructations and Hiccough. ► Eructations , [12] , [22] . ► Eructations of gas (ten minutes after 40 drops), [11] . ► *Eructations of gas smelling of bad eggs , [11] . ► Eructations of an acrid, salty fluid (afternoon, second day), [7] . ► Eructations as after radishes (fifty-five minutes after 5 drops), [11] . ► Eructations after breakfast, [14] . [550.] ► Eructations and passage of flatus (soon), [14] . ► Eructations and passages of flatus, with slight pain in the abdomen, [14] . ► Eructations, with some desire to vomit (some time after 10 drops), [14] . ► Severe eructations, accompanied by pain in the let side of the abdomen, near the anterior superior spinous process of the ilium (after supper, eleventh day), [14] . ► Empty eructations (after a quarter of an hour), [1] . ► Sour eructations, [1] . ► Regurgitation of food by eructations (after five hours), [1] . ► Hiccough, [22] . ► Frequent hiccough (thirty minutes after 20 drops), [11] . ► Frequently a single hiccough (after one hour), [1] . ► Heartburn. [560.] ► Sensation of heartburn in the stomach, [10] . ► Nausea and Vomiting. ► Qualmishness and faintlike nausea, [1] . ► The qualmishness (faintlike nausea) in the pit of the stomach disappears on eating, [1] . ► Nausea, [18] . ► Nausea, [22] . ► Nausea in the morning, [1] . ► Nausea after eating, [1] . ► Nausea after breakfast, lasting the whole morning, [1] . ► *Nausea after the morning coffee, with attacks of suffocation , [1] . ► Nausea, with collection of saliva in the mouth, [1] . [570.] ► Slight nausea, with some tension in the stomach (forty-five minutes after 40 drops), [11] . ► Slight attack of nausea, with tensive pain in the stomach (soon), [8] . ► Inclination to vomit, [23] . ► Inclination to vomit, as if one would faint, [1] . ► Almost constant desire to vomit, [12] . ► Irritation to vomit at 8 A.M., [13] . ► Vomiting, [4] . ► (Vomiting, without previous eructations), [1] . ► Vomiting of food, at first caused by fulness of the abdomen, but afterwards by intolerable nausea, [1] . ► *Sour vomiting (sour smell from the mouth), [1] . [580.] ► Bilious vomiting (children, from flowers), [19] . ► Stomach. ► Pain in the stomach (fourth and thirty-ninth days), [14] . ► Some pain in the stomach, [14] . ► Some pain in the pit of the stomach, on pressure (second morning after 5 drops), [11] . ► Transient pain in the stomach (soon after 5 drops), [11] . ► Severe pain on the right side near the pit of the stomach (sixth day), [14] . ► Sensation of warmth and fulness in the epigastrium (after 5 drops), [14] . ► Heat in the stomach and slight burning of it (forty-five minutes after 10 drops), [11] . ► Fulness while eating, with nausea after eating, [1] . ► Fulness, heaviness, and uncomfortable tension in the stomach, extending up into the pharynx, with a sensation of heartburn (third day after 5 drops), [11] . [590.] ► An unpleasant sensation of fulness in the stomach, with pressure and tension in it (third day after 5 drops), [11] . ► Repletion of the stomach after eating, lasting until the next day; nausea, [1] . ► Tension in the stomach (eleven hours after 60 drops), [11] . ► Tension in the stomach and sophagus, with attacks of great nausea (soon after taking), [8] . ► Tension and heaviness in the stomach, with slight attacks of nausea (third hour after 5 drops), [11] . ► Tension and pressure in the stomach, with nausea (second day), [9] . ► Tension in the stomach and slight sensation of nausea, [10] . ► Spasmodic tension in the stomach, and above the navel generally, [9] . ► Spasmodic tension in the stomach and intestines about the navel, [9] . ► Spasmodic tension in the stomach, with some nausea (soon after 60 drops), [11] . [600.] ► Spasmodic tension in the stomach, with sensation of slight nausea, [11] . ► Unpleasant sensation of tension in the stomach and umbilical region, lasting for several hours (fourth day), [7] . ► Spasmodic sensation of tension in the stomach, extending along the sophagus to the throat, and accompanied by excessive apprehension and nausea, with inclination to vomit from the much-increased secretion of sweetish saliva, [9] . ► Drawing and pressive pain in the stomach and sensation of heaviness in it, as if the stomach were distended by a hard body, which, however, soon disappeared (second day), [7] . ► Oppression of stomach, [22] . ► Oppression of stomach (16 to 20 grains), [21] . ► Pain in stomach, pressure, [18] . ► *Pressure in the stomach, as from a stone pressing down , [1] . ► *Pressure in the stomach after eating a little (five hours after 5 drops), [11] . ► Pressure and heaviness in the stomach after eating a little (second morning after 5 drops), [11] . [610.] ► Pressure and tension in the stomach, [10] . ► Pressure and spasmodic constriction in the stomach, especially at the cardiac orifice (third day), [7] . ► Frequent pressure at the cardiac orifice of the stomach, not seldom extended up the sophagus (afternoon of second day), [7] . ► *Pressive pain in the stomach and beneath the short ribs, which impedes the breath, especially after drinking coffee (after one hour), [1] . ► Anxious cries about pain in the pit of the stomach, as if the heart were pressed down, with profuse sweat, [1] . ► Some stitches in the stomach (sixth day), [14] . ► Violent sharp stitches in the pit of the stomach, [11] .

abdomen.text: ABDOMEN. ► Hypochondria. ► Incarceration of flatulence in the hypochondria (later action), [1] . ► Sensation in the region of the liver as if a hernia would appear, while walking a few minutes (sixth day), [10] . ► Sensation in the anterior portion of the region of the liver as if a hernia would protrude (for the third time), relieved by pressure and rubbing, while sitting (fourth day after 5 drops), [11] . [620.] ► While walking, about noon, a sensation on the anterior margin of the liver as if a hernia would protrude, relieved by pressure and by rubbing (second day after 5 drops), [11] . ► Some pain in the right side, near the pit of the stomach (third day), [14] . ► Continual tensive pain in the hypochondriac region, with tension around the brain (with a dry catarrh in the chest), (after one hour), [1] . ► Pressure in the hypochondria and in the stomach, after eating, [1] . ► Sticking in the left side, near the pit of the stomach (second day), [14] . ► Stitches in the right hypochondrium, while walking, and again, for the fourth time, sensation in the right side of the abdomen as if a hernia would protrude, relieved by slowly walking about, and by rubbing the abdomen (fifth day after 60 drops), [11] . ► Stitches in the left hypochondrium while walking, relieved by pressure and by drawing the abdomen inward (three hours after 60 drops), [11] . ► Stitches in the right hypochondrium, especially while standing and walking (fourth day after 5 drops), [11] . ► Frequent stitches in the right hypochondrium during the day (twelfth day after 60 drops), [11] . ► Umbilicus and Flanks. ► A kind of hysterical movement around navel (ether. oil), [18] . [630.] ► Cutting above the navel, soon after dinner, [13] . ► Pressive colic about the navel, [1] . ► *Griping-tearing colic in the region of the navel and lower down on both sides, with pain in the small of the back, as if it were broken , [1] . ► Gurgling in the side, extending into the abdomen, [1] . ► General Abdomen. ► Abdomen distended, [11] . ► Abdomen distended and hard, when going to sleep in the evening (third day), [7] . ► Abdomen somewhat distended, [9] . ► Abdomen somewhat distended and tense (after three hours), [11] . ► Distension in the abdomen, after eating , [1] . ► Painful distension of the region of the upper abdomen, in the morning, [1] . [650.] ► Discharge of wind upwards and downwards (16 to 20 grains), [21] . ► Rubbing abdomen in a circle with flat hand causes discharge of flatus, and some relief (second day), [17] . ► Morning, on rising, a faint feeling in upper part of abdomen, which causes a kind of anxiety and restlessness (second day), [17] . ► Sensation as if the whole abdomen were hollow, together with constant motion in the intestines (with blue rings around the eyes); when the attack occurs in the evening it is associated for a short time with anxiety (after twenty-four hours), [1] . ► Troubles in the abdomen, as in constipation (after four hours), [1] . ► Pain in the abdomen, as when constipation causes a delayed passage of the stool, [1] . [All the symptoms of constipation are secondary, that is, a reaction of the organism from the effects of Chamomilla; its primary action is to cause diarrha. -H.] ► Pain in the abdomen, as if diarrha would ensue, relieved by passing flatus (third day after 60 drops), [11] . ► Pain in the abdomen, and afterwards transient, but not severe stitches transversely across the abdomen, (soon), [14] . ► Morning, before rising, gradually increasing pain in bowels causes him to twist and turn; doubling-up relieved a short time (second day), [17] . ► A sensation of severe tension, chiefly above the navel, with slight transient nausea (third day), [7] . [670.] ► Sticking in the left side of the abdomen, while walking, with a sensation as if a hernia would protrude (the fifth appearance of this symptom), (tenth day after 60 drops), [11] . ► Punctiform sticking in the abdomen near the ilium on the left side, seldom on the right side, when walking, especially after eating, relieved or removed by pressure with the hand, or by bending far forward, while walking, [14] . ► Stitches in the abdomen (twelfth day), [14] . ► Stitches in the abdomen, with desire for stool and passage of flatus, [14] . ► Stitches in the abdomen, with urging to stool, soon followed by stool, after dinner (sixth day), [14] . ► Stitches in the right side of the abdomen near the limb, after violent running (twelfth day), [14] . ► Transient stitches, especially in the liver, while walking or taking a deep breath, [11] . ► Punctiform stitches on the right side of the abdomen, [14] . ► Cutting in the abdomen, extending deep down into the pelvis, on waking (third day), [7] . ► Cutting, at times in the abdomen, extending downward to the bladder, and relieved by passage of flatus and by slight rubbing (afternoon, second day), [7] . [680.] ► During the day, here and there tearing pains, and slight pains in bowels (second day), [17] . ► *Colic returns from time to time; flatulence accumulates in the hypochondria, and stitches shoot through the chest (after eight hours), [1] . ► Extraordinary colic, on account of which she did not know where to rest, [1] . ► Intolerable colic, in the morning at sunrise, [1] . ► *Cutting colic and drawing in the thighs before the menses , [1] . ► Colic, rather cutting than griping, [1] . ► *Colic, rather cutting than sticking, with accumulation of saliva in the mouth , [1] . ► Constant tearing colic in the side of the abdomen, as if the parts were rolled up into a ball, [1] . ► Flatulent colic (after one and several hours), [1] . ► Flatulent colic; flatulence moves here and there with great force, as if it would push through the abdominal muscles, with loud rumbling and gurgling; it especially pushes towards the abdominal rings when the colic subsides, only a very little flatulence, nor can any trace of it be discovered in the abdomen (after three hours), [1] . ► Hypogastrium and Iliac Regions. [710.] ► Painful diarrha, with nausea, in the night (twenty-ninth day), [14] . ► *White slimy diarrha, with colic (after one and three hours), [1] . ► Watery diarrha, with (and without) colic, [1] . ► *Painless , green, watery diarrha , consisting of fæces and mucus together , [1] . ► Afternoon, a diarrhic stool, with some pains in abdomen and passage of wind (second day), [17] . ►► *Stool hot (like diarrha) smelling like rotten eggs , [1] . ► Easy stool (third hour after 5 drops), [11] . ► Easy stool, at noon (third day after 60 drops), [11] . ► Stool, since taking, had been regular every day and easy, but after the effect of the drug passed off it, occurred only every second day, and was again hard as before the proving, [7] . ► Hard dry stool in the afternoon (second day after 60 drops), [11] . [720.] ► (Undigested stool), [1] . ► Discharge of light-yellow fæces, with sharp griping colic (after twelve and twenty-four hours), [1] . ► Fæces coated with mucus and with mucus between the fæces, [1] . ► Diminished stool, [18] . ► Constipation. ► Constipation, [1] . ► Constipation (third and fourth days), [17] . ► Constipation from inactivity of the rectum, so that the fæces could only be evacuated by pressure of the abdominal muscles (after one and four hours), [1] .

urinary.text: URINARY ORGANS. ► Sensation of weakness in the region of the kidneys (second day), [10] . ► *Dragging towards the ureters like labor-pains, with very frequent urging to urinate , [1] . ► Sticking pain in the neck of the bladder, when not urinating, [1] . [730.] ► *Burning in the neck of the bladder, when urinating , [1] . ► Biting pain in the urethra, when urinating, [1] . ► Micturition. ► Increased secretion of urine, [11] . ► Increased secretion of urine and saliva, throughout the day, [9] . ► Secretion of clear, not very acid urine, somewhat increased (first day), [6] . ► More than usually copious secretion of urine (second day after 5 drops), [11] . ► The force of the bladder is weakened; the urine passes in a weak stream (after twenty hours), [1] . ► Involuntary passage of urine (after three and four hours), [1] . ► (Urination is prevented on account of pain in the abdomen), [1] . SEXUAL ORGANS. ► Male. ► Erections, in the morning in bed, [1] . [740.] ► Violent erections (soon after taking), [11] . ► Violent erections, soon after taking, but they disappear in thirty-five minutes, with a general flush of heat over the whole body, followed by slight sweat, with which all the former symptoms were relieved, and only a slight nausea remained, [11] . ► Violent erections (twenty minutes after 20 drops; forty-five minutes after 5 drops; fourth day after 5 drops), [11] . ► Frequent violent erections, during the whole afternoon (fourth hour after 20 drops), [11] . ► Dark blood from genitals, [19] . ► Itching-sticking pain on the margin of the prepuce (after three hours), [1] . ► Soreness on the margin of the prepuce, [1] . ► Severe stitches in the "bulbo-cavernous" muscles (twenty minutes after 20 drops), [11] . ► Sexual desire (later action), [1] . ► Nightly emissions, [1] . [750.] ► Emission during the night (since taking Chamomilla the prover noticed that emissions had been much diminished, although frequent continued erections had taken place), (third day after 60 drops), [11] . ► Female. ►► *Drawing from the sacral region forward, griping and pinching in the uterus, followed by discharge of large clots of blood , [1] . ► Metrorrhagia, [1] . ► Metrorrhagia, even in old people, [1] . ►► *Profuse discharge of clotted blood, with severe pains like labor-pains in the uterus , with tearing pains in the veins of the lower leg , [1] . ► *Acrid, biting, watery discharge from the vagina, after dinner , [1] . ► *Yellow, biting leucorrha , [1] . ► Smarting-burning in the vagina, [1] . ► Suppression of the menses, with swelling of the pit of the stomach, and a pain as if the heart would be pressed down, with swollen abdomen, labor-like pains, and anasarca, [1] .

Inclination to make water, with anxiety. On making water, itching and burning in the urethra. Urine hot and yellowish, with fleecy sediment; or turbid urine, with yellowish sediment. Involuntary or feeble emission of urine. Excoriation at the edge of the prepuce.

Dragging towards ureters like labor pains, with very frequent urging to urinate. Sticking pain in neck of bladder when not urinating. Burning in neck of bladder when urinating. Ineffectual urging, with anguish ; sensation of smarting, or burning pain in urethra, during micturition. Desire to pass water frequently, it being profuse and pale. θ Nervous disorders. Biting pain in urethra when urinating. Urination prevented on account of pain in abdomen. Force of bladder is weakened, urine passes in a weak stream. Involuntary passage of urine, which feels hot. Involuntary urination at night. Urine : hot ; yellow, with flaky sediment ; scanty ; turbid, clay-colored soon after passing ; turbid, gets thick when standing, sediment yellow ; abundant and light-colored ; red as blood.

respiratory.text: RESPIRATORY ORGANS. ► Larynx, Trachea, and Bronchi. ► Some accumulation of mucus in the air-passages, with rattling respiration; on hawking, a few drops of blood are raised (third day), [11] . [760.] ► *Sensation of slight pressure on the air-passages, with some irritation to cough (forty-five minutes after 5 drops), [11] . ► *Sensation of rawness in the upper part of the air-passages , [11] . ► Tickling in the air-passages, frequent irritation to a hacking cough (afternoon of second day), [7] . ► Sensation of oppression and slight constriction in the region of the larynx (after five minutes), [6] . ► Feeling as though some fluid would rise up out of the larynx (forty-five minutes after 5 drops), [11] . ► Irritation to cough in the larynx, with accumulation of mucus which rises from the air-passages into the larynx; this mucus has a sweetish taste, and is involuntarily swallowed before he can expectorate it (second day after 5 drops), [11] . ► *Almost uninterrupted irritation to cough beneath the upper part of the sternum, without, however, any cough , [1] . ► Burning in the larynx, [1] . ► *Sensation of rawness and scraping in the larynx (four hours after 20 drops), [11] . ► Scraping in the larynx, with sensation as if the tonsils were swollen, and as if the uvula was too long (these sensations are, however, very transient); together with somewhat increased secretion of saliva (third day after 5 drops), [11] . [770.] ► Tickling in the larynx, with a hacking cough and expectoration of a few drops of clear blood (third morning after 5 drops), [11] . ► Voice. ► Voice always rough, [11] . ► Voice raw and hoarse, [17] . ► Hoarseness on account of tough mucus in the larynx, which is only detached by very violent hawking (after three hours), [1] . ► Hoarseness and cough on account of rattling mucus in the upper part of the trachea; the place from which the mucus was detached feels sore (after two hours), [1] . ► Catarrhal hoarseness of the trachea, with dryness of the eyelids, from one to eight hours , [1] . ► Cough and Expectoration. ► *Cough, caused by irritation low down in the air-passages, during the night, [13] . ► *Paroxysms of coughing about midnight, with which something seems to rise into the throat, as if she would suffocate , [1] . ► (The child becomes angry, and then coughs), [1] . ► Dry cough, four or five times a day, [1] . [780.] ► Dry cough, on account of itching irritation and continual tickling in that portion of the trachea behind the pit of the throat (after four hours), [1] . ► *Severe dry cough, during sleep (after eleven hours), [1] . ► Frequent expectoration of clear blood, preceded by tickling in the larynx and air-passages (third day after 5 drops), [11] . ► Respiration. ► Short, panting breath, [2] . ► Rapid, deep breathing, with great heaving of the chest, [2] . ► Snoring inspirations during sleep, [1] . ► Snoring inspirations in sleep, which are shorter than the expirations, with open mouth, and hot clammy sweat on the forehead (after three hours), [1] . ► *Whistling, wheezing, and rattling in the trachea, when breathing , [1] . ► Respiration before taking 16, afterwards ranged 16, 17, 15, 14, 16, [10] . ► Respiration, before taking the drug on the second morning, 13; after taking two drops of the tincture it rose to 19, then 15, 16, 14, [11] . [790.] ► Respiration before taking, 14; after five minutes to forty minutes, 15; after forty-five to sixty minutes, 14 (after the 6th), [7] . ► Respiration before taking, 14, twenty minutes after, 13, where it continued for an hour (second experiment), [7] . ► Respiration before taking the drug, 12, in bed; after taking the drug, 15, then 16, within an hour; after an hour, 15; after two hours, 16; after six hours, 15; after eight hours, 16; at 8 P.M., 18, [11] . ► Respiration, 12, second morning in bed (before taking Cham. 3d, 1 grain), afterwards ranged 12, 15, 14, 13, [8] . ► Respiration 12 to 13; after two hours, 17; after four hours, 16; after eight hours, 15 (from the 2d), [9] . ► Respiration in the morning 14, afterwards 17 to 18 (second day), [10] . ► Respiration in the morning, 13; at 9 A.M., 19; 11 A.M., 14; 7 P.M., 16 (third day), [10] . ► Short breath, with palpitation and small hard pulse, 108, after a short rapid walk; respiration 34 (second day after 5 drops), [11] . ► In the afternoon, while walking rapidly up a steep path, loss of breath, palpitation, and stitches in right side of chest, soon followed by expectoration of a few drops of clear red blood; this old oppression of the chest and dyspna has been again noticed on rapid walking (seventh day after 60 drops), [11] . ► Dyspna, as from suffocative catarrh (the larynx feels constricted) in the region of the pit of the throat, a constant irritation to cough (after a quarter of an hour), [1] .
Hoarseness, hawking, rawness of larynx. Irritable, dry, tickling cough; suffocative tightness of chest, with bitter expectoration in daytime. Rattling of mucus in child's chest

VOICE AND LARYNX. TRACHEA AND BRONCHIA. [25] [Cham.]. Burning in larynx. Sensation of rawness and scraping in larynx. Sensation of rawness in upper part of air passages. Sensation of slight pressure on air passages, with some irritation to cough. Tickling in pit of throat causing scraping, dry cough. Voice hoarse. Catarrhal hoarseness, with dryness of eyelids, burning or stinging sensation in larynx, painful soreness in one spot, only relieved by long coughing and raising a little phlegm. Hoarseness, on account of tough mucus in larynx, which can only be relieved by strong hawking. Hoarseness, with violent persistent cough, a high degree of heat every evening, with fretfulness on awaking ; and child frets and scolds, asks for one thing and then for another. Hoarseness after taking cold. Inflammation of throat, with stinging, ulcerative pain at epiglottis, which excites cough and interferes with swallowing. Whistling, wheezing and rattling in trachea, when breathing. Sensation of cord around trachea, with constant desire to cough. Croup of children ; spasm of chest, with suffocative attacks after anger ; child wants to be carried. Nervous bronchial asthma. Anxious breathing. Oppressed breathing, as if chest was not wide enough. Dyspnœa, constricted feeling at suprasternal fossa, with constant irritation to cough. Dyspnœa, as from suffocative catarrh (larynx feels constricted) in region of pit of throat, a constant irritation to cough. Suffocative dyspnœa, with sensation of being strangled by cord around trachea ; constant desire to cough. Suffocative attacks from repercussion of measles eruption, by taking cold. Rapid, deep breathing, with great heaving of chest. Short, panting breath. Short breath, with rattling. Short, croaking breathing. Draws short, deep breaths, with great elevation of thorax. Rattling breathing, with cough. Rattling breathing, slow inspiration and rapid expiration. Sour smelling or fetid breath. Loud, rattling, sighing or unequal respiration. Snoring inspirations during sleep, which are shorter than the expirations, with open mouth and hot, clammy sweat on forehead. Asthma after a fit of anger. Asthmatic attack, seemingly produced by an accumulation of flatus, > from bending head back, in cold air, and from drinking cold water ; < in dry weather and from warm diet. Asthma from vapors of sulphur, after Pulsat. The child becomes angry and then coughs. Cough and hoarseness with rattling mucus in trachea, especially during winter. Constant irritation to cough, beneath upper part of sternum. Constant desire to cough, with sensation of cord around trachea. Cough caused by irritation low down in air passages, during night. Cough from tickling in chest. Paroxysms of coughing about midnight, with which something seems to rise in throat, as if she would suffocate. Cough, particularly at night, with tough, slimy expectoration, tasting bitter and putrid. Dry cough < at night and during sleep. Cough, with expectoration during day, without at night. Dry cough from catching cold. Rough, scraping cough of children in winter, with tickling in suprasternal fossa, < at night. Dry cough, continuing during sleep. Cough dry and hacking ; child is very fretful. Scraping, dry cough, caused by tickling in pit of throat, < at night, even in sleep, especially with children after taking cold in winter. Rough, dry cough. θ Sequel to measles. Cough, with flushes of heat in face, at same time chilliness of limbs and back. Cough threatens to burst chest. θ Rheumatism. Amelioration of cough, when getting warm in bed. Expectoration bloody, dark and coagulated. Cough, with rattling in chest. Expectoration : acrid, blood coagulated ; dark ; mucous ; viscous ; watery. Taste of expectoration : bitter, putrid, or sour. Catarrhal stage of whooping cough, with constant irritating, dry cough.

(second day), [9] .
