[860.] ► Stitches below the left nipple (sixteenth day), [1] . ► Severe stitches in a place as large as half a dollar, above the left nipple, lasting half an hour (after nine hours), [11] . ► Jerking in the left pectoralis major muscle (third day), [14] .

heart.text: HEART AND PULSE. ► Præcordium. ► Rush of blood to the heart (immediately), [1] . ► Qualmishness about the heart, [1] . ► A feeling in the heart as if it hurt, which seems to be pressed down, [1] . ► Something presses the heart down (cardialgia), [1] . ► Stitches in the upper part of the heart, [11] . ► Stitches in the upper part of the right ventricle of the heart (fifteen minutes after 40 drops), [11] . ► Sudden stitches at the heart, arresting breathing, during motion, [2] . [870.] ► Slight stitches in region of heart, [18] . ► Slight stitches in cardiac region (12 grains), [21] . ► Frequent, deepseated, internal stitches above the heart, during the day, but especially severe and frequent in the morning, [9] . ► Heart's Action. ► Palpitation , [18] , [22] . ► Palpitation of the heart (tenth day), [14] . ► Slight palpitation of heart (8 to 14 grains, soon after), [21] . ► Pulse. ► Rapid pulse, [18] , [22] . ► Increased rapidity of pulse (16 to 20 grains, 22 and 24 grains), [21] . ► Pulse, previous to taking the drug, 72 small, and easily compressed; after taking, 80 irregular, and small; 80, 76, 80 (somewhat fuller), 84, 88, 88, during the hour after 60 drops, [11] . ► Pulse previous to taking the drug, 83, full, and strong, not quite regular; during the hour after 40 drops, 88, 80, 77, 82, 78, 75, 76, 72, 70, 72, 70 (after 40 drops), [11] . [880.] ► Pulse, previously full and hard, 80, became smaller and soft; during the hour ranged 82, 82, 80, 78, 72, 96 (immediately after taking), [10] . ► Pulse previously 80, full, and soft; after taking ten drops of the tincture, 80 (somewhat harder), 82, 88, 82, 86, 83, 80, 84, 92, 82 (and very irregular), 82, 78; taken every five minutes during the hour, [11] . ► Pulse, before taking the drug, 64, soft, full (in bed); after taking the drug (taken six times during the hour), pulse 70, 68, 68, 68, 64, 68; after one hour, pulse 98, small, and soft; after three hours, 88, full, and soft; after six hours, 82, full, and soft; after eight hours, 80; at 8 P.M., after fourteen hours, 76, full, and soft, [11] . ► Before taking the drug in the morning, while fasting, the pulse, while lying in bed, was 71, soft, and somewhat irregular; five minutes after taking the drug, the pulse was 74; after ten minutes, 72; after fifteen minutes, 71; after twenty minutes, 69; after twenty-five minutes, 68, [6] . ► Pulse, before taking, 69, soft, and full; after five minutes, 74; after ten minutes, 74; after fifteen minutes, 70; after twenty minutes, 71; after twenty-five minutes, 70; after thirty minutes, 69; after thirty-five minutes, 67; after forty minutes, 68; after forty-five minutes, 70; after fifty minutes, 68; after fifty-five minutes, 69; after sixty minutes, 70 (from the 6th), [7] . ► Pulse 60, full, and soft, before taking the drug the second morning; after taking 2 drops of the tincture, pulse rose in ten minutes to 64, and was smaller; after this is did not change for fifty minutes, [11] . ► Pulse, before taking, 64; after taking 4 drops of the tincture, the pulse did not rise as in former provings, but after half an hour fell to 60, [11] . ► Pulse before taking, 69; after five minutes, 72, then 75, after which, every five minutes, it ranged as follows: 67, 65, 64, 66, 68, 68, 65, 65, 66, 65, 68 (second experiment), [7] . ► Before taking it, while lying in bed, pulse 60, respiration 13; pulse taken every five minutes as follows: 60, 61, 64, 61, 61, 61, 64; three hours after rising, pulse 88, respiration 15 (soon after taking), (from the 3d), [8] . ► Pulse, before taking, 60; afterwards ranged, within an hour, 68, 72, 64, 60, 64; became smaller and softer (after second dose of Cham. 2d), [9] . [890.] ► Pulse showed no change for one hour after taking, 60; during the next thirty or forty minutes rose soon to 64; at 8 A.M., two hours after taking, 100, smaller, and harder; at 10 A.M., 96; at 2 and 8 P.M., 78 (after taking the 2d), [9] . ► Pulse, after five minutes, small, scarcely perceptible; after ten minutes, somewhat fuller; in twenty-five minutes, irregular, and rapid (88); in forty minutes, again small, and scarcely perceptible; in forty-five minutes, again irregular, and rapid (after 5 drops), [11] . ► Pulse at one time very strong, at another small and weak, and also irregular as to frequency, after one hour; after two hours, 88, full, and soft; after four hours, 90, small, and easily compressed; after six hours, 82 (after 60 drops), [11] . ► Pulse, in the morning in bed, at 6 A.M., 64, full; at 7 A.M., 90, tense; at 8 A.M., 80; at 10 A.M., 92, scarcely perceptible; at 11 A.M., 96; at 3 P.M., 92; at 5 P.M., 78, soft, and small; at 7 P.M., 88 (second day after 5 drops), [11] . ► Pulse, at 6 A.M. in bed, 60; at 7 A.M., 82; at 9 A.M., 88; at 10 A.M., 92; at 11 A.M., 92; at 1 P.M., 76; at 2 P.M., 76; at 7 P.M., 70; at 10 P.M., on lying down in bed, 68; the pulse was very soft until 10 A.M., afterwards somewhat full; and in the evening rather hard (fourth day), when all the drug symptoms had disappeared, [8] . ► Pulse 57, soft, and weak, second morning in bed; after taking Cham. 3d, 1 grain, pulse ranged 60, 61, 64, 60, [8] . ► Pulse hard, and full, on waking, 64; at 9 A.M., 80; at ten, 92; at eleven, 86; at twelve, noon, 88 (second day), [10] . ► Pulse 68, small, and easily compressible, in the morning (eleventh day after 60 drops), [11] . ► Pulse, in the morning, 65, soft; at 9 A.M., 100, small, and soft; at 11 A.M., 80, small, and weak; at 7 P.M., 72, small, and soft (third day), [10] . ► At 5 A.M., pulse 60, full, soft; at 7 A.M., 88, small, tense; at 9 A.M., 98, small, and very soft; at 1 P.M., 80, rather stronger; at 3 P.M., 88, small, and hardish; at 5 P.M., 84 (second day after 5 drops), [11] . [900.] ► Pulse, at 6 A.M., 60, full, and strong; at 7 A.M., 72; at 9 A.M., 80; at 12 P.M., 74; at 4 P.M., 80; at 9 P.M., 72, [8] . ► After two hours, pulse 66, respiration 14 (second experiment), [7] . ► Pulse 65 (fourth day), [7] . >>>>> Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Cham.

extremities.text: EXTREMITIES IN GENERAL. ► Objective. [950.] ► Convulsive single jerkings of the limbs, when just falling asleep, [1] . ► Cracking of the joints, especially of the lower limbs, with pain in them as if bruised , with, however, no corresponding weariness (after eight hours), [1] . ► The hands and feet became easily stiffened in the cold, as if they would be frozen (after five hours), [1] . ► Subjective. ► Weariness and weakness in the limbs, [14] . ► Great weariness of the limbs, [10] . ► Slight sensation of weariness in the limbs, especially in the knees (walking relieved all the symptoms), (fifth hour after 5 drops), [11] . ► Sudden sensation of exhaustion in the limbs (after five minutes), [6] . ► The characteristic sensation of exhaustion and loss of power in the limbs reappeared again, though no so marked as after taking the drug, and was to-day noticed only in the morning (third day), [8] . ► Heaviness of all the limbs, [1] . ► Heaviness in all the limbs (thirty minutes after 5 drops), [11] . [960.] ► Forenoons, painful heaviness in all the limbs, with twisting-tearing pains in right upper arm, left leg, and back in temporal muscles, finally seated in the teeth on left side, [17] . ► Heaviness of the limbs, with yawning and sleepiness the whole day, [1] . ► Heaviness of the limbs and general sensation of weakness, on waking (second day), [7] . ► Painful heaviness and tired feeling in the limbs repeated, especially lower extremities so tired and heavy that he desired to sit rather than walk, [17] . ► The limbs go to sleep, while sitting (thirty minutes after 10 drops), [11] . ► *Pain in the periosteum of the limbs, with paralytic weakness , [1] . ► Pain in left forearm and right lower leg (seventeenth day), [14] . ► Slight pains in the knees and elbows (nineteenth day after 60 drops), [11] . ► Paralytic-like pains in the volar surface of the metatarsus, or in the dorsal surface of the metacarpus, or the lower half of the bones of the forearm and lower leg, especially on their dorsal surface (second day after 60 drops), [11] . ► Simple pains in all the joints on motion, as if they were stiff and would break (after six hours), [1] . [970.] ► Drawing pain, now in the fibula, now in the ulna, always extending from the joint above into the bone, and repeated after indefinite intervals, [11] . ► Drawing in the joints, jumping from one to another, in the morning (after 5 drops), [11] . ► Drawing and digging in the articular extremities of the long bones (three hours after 5 drops), [11] . ► In forenoon, some drawing pains in shoulders and ankles, with an unusual weak and heavy feeling in limbs, but especially painful, weak sensation, and restlessness in arms, as from great exertion; worse in rest; relieved and disappearing on motion and going in open air, [17] . ► Severe drawing and tearing in the limbs, especially along the right forearm into the wrist, together with a sensation in the forearm as from a strong pressure upon the nerves (eighth day after 60 drops), [11] . ► Very slight, transient, paralytic drawing pains in various joints, in the elbows, wrists, knees, and extending thence along the bones, soon followed by sensation of most extreme exhaustion, [11] . ► The drawing pains and dull stitches about the joints seem intolerable, and make him peevish (third day after 5 drops), [11] . ► Sticking or drawing pains in right, then left, lower leg, extending into ankles and dorsa of feet, then again in right shoulder, on hips, or left half of head, [18] . ► Transient stitches in the joints, especially in the right knee-joint, [11] . ► Frequent stitches in the joints, extending into the bones (twelfth day after 60 drops), [11] . [980.] ► Tearing in the limbs, arms and legs especially, now in the lower, now in the upper half of the fibula, then along the tibia, also now in the metacarpal, now in the metatarsal bones, and especially along the outer side of the radius; then pain in the knees and elbows, along the flexor surface, especially noticed on stretching the joints; these pains seem to be seated in the tendons and in the bellies of the flexor muscles (third day after 60 drops), [11] . ► Tearing pain in the limbs, which can only be relieved by constant tossing about in bed, [1] . ► Bruised sensation, even in the bones, with dull stitches in the ulna and tibia, which seem to start from the joints (second day), [9] . ► Bruised sensation in the joints, especially in the right wrist, at 7 P.M. (second day after 5 drops), [11] . ► Bruised pains in the limbs, with stitches along the bones and in the joints, especially in the knees (fifth day after 60 drops), [11] . ► *All the joints are sore, as if bruised and tired out; there is no power in the hands and feet, though without corresponding weariness , [1] . ► Single, seldom, drawing-tearing jerks in the long bones of the limbs, or in the tendons, [1] .

Violent rheumatic pains drive him out of bed at night; compelled to walk about. Burning of soles at night (Sulph). Ankles give way in the afternoon. Nightly paralytic loss of power in the feet, unable to step on them

Uninterrupted fine sensitive pressure in articular ligaments and periosteum of arm from shoulder to fingers, a drawing-tearing, < after midnight, when lying on back, > when lying upon painful arm. Jerking stitches like electric sparks in left shoulder and extending into cervical muscles. Stitches extending through right arm to shoulder. Pain in arms, cannot bear slightest motion. Tearing pain in muscles of arms, particularly in flexors of forearm, in morning soon after waking, < in cool evening air. Stiffness of arm, as if it would go to sleep, when one grasps anything with hand. Crawling tearing in bones of arm, extending into fingers, as if arm was numb. Pricking numb sensation in right arm, waking from sleep at night. Arms immediately go to sleep, if she grasps anything firmly ; she is obliged to let them sink down. Paralytic like pressive sensation along nerves of arm, extending to tips of fingers. Drawing and paralytic pain in elbows and hands. Drawing pain in inner portion of arm, from elbow to tips of fingers, late in evening. Pain in elbows as after carrying a heavy weight with arms bent, aggravated by extending arms, < on right side. Drawing pain and stitches in wrist. Left arm went to sleep without having been lying on it. Convulsions of arms, with clenching of thumbs. Convulsive twitchings of fingers. Severe stitches in arms along bones, especially in forearms and in metacarpal bones. Stitches in hands and finger joints. Burning pain in hand, in afternoon. Fingers become cold and are inclined to "go to sleep," while sitting. Fingers "go to sleep," in morning. Cold hands, with cold perspiration in palms of hands. θ Rheumatism. Pain in thumb and index finger, as from a sprain or a strain, or from too great exertion, or as if it was broken ; felt when moving it. Finger joints red and swollen. Pain in hip joint, as if sprained, on walking, after sitting, in evening. A kind of fierce labor pain, extending from sacrum into thigh, a drawing paralytic pain. Violent drawing tearing pains from left ischium to os calcis and sole, with cramplike tension of muscles. θ Sciatica. Stitches in nates and thighs. Pain on posterior surface of right thigh when walking. Bruised pain in thighs. Tearing pains down legs. Short attacks of exhaustion, especially of lower extremities. An indescribable pain in thigh on rising after sitting, and when lying with thigh stretched out. Paralytic stiffness with weariness of thigh, like a bruise. Stitches in thighs. Bruised pain in thighs. Heaviness and lassitude in legs. θ Post-partum hemorrhage. Restlessness of legs and feet, at night. He was obliged to stretch out legs from time to time in order to get rested. Trembling of lower leg, when going to sleep. Tearing pain in upper and lower legs. Stitches jumping about from place to place, especially in knees and ankles, disappearing on motion. Tension in knees. Cracking of knee during motion. She had to draw up her feet on account of pain in calves and knees, when she stretches they "go to sleep.". Drawing pain, extending from knee through lower leg, late in evening. Drawing, tearing pain, extending from knee to ankle. Violent drawing up of knees towards chest so soon as he falls asleep, dreams he is falling into the depths. Stitches below head of fibula. Cramp in legs and calves. Crawling and heaviness of calves. Sensation in legs as if they would fall asleep. Redness and swelling around malleoli. θ Rheumatism. Constrictive sensation in ankles. Tearing pain in feet, he cannot allow them to be covered in bed. Tearing pain in feet after a severe chill ; must lie down and keep quiet, pain in ankle, < from every motion. Feet seemed paralyzed, and pithy in soles on stepping on them, < at night. Itching pain internally in side of heel. It seems as though toes would bend up and would go to sleep, while sitting, especially great toe. Spasmodic contraction of toes, with tearing pain in limbs. Tearing pain in feet following a severe chill ; she has to lie down and keep quiet, every motion brings on pain in joint of foot. Feet feel paralyzed, with faintness. See 29. Tension in feet and up calves. Burning of soles, at night ; puts feet out of bed. Sensation of numbness in toes. Pain in periosteum, with paralytic weakness. Drawing and tearing pains in limbs, < at night. Tearing (neuralgic) pain in all limbs ; only > by constant tossing about in bed. Aching in all limbs, with lassitude. Pain in limbs, with weakness, slow dragging gait. Drawing tearing jerks in long bones of limbs, or in tendons. Nightly lame, tearing pain in limbs, with sensation of numbness. Limbs feel heavy. θ Threatened miscarriage. Stiffness in limbs. Convulsive twitching in limbs. θ Threatened miscarriage. Convulsive, single jerks of limbs, when just falling asleep. Hands and feet become easily stiffened in cold, as if they would be frozen. Joints sore, as if bruised and tired out ; no power in hands and feet. Pains in all joints on motion, as if they were stiff and would break. Cracking in joints, especially of lower limbs, with pains therein, as if bruised. Violent rheumatic pains drive him out of bed at night, and compel him to walk about.

upper_extremities.text: SUPERIOR EXTREMITIES. ► Very severe paralytic-like pain in the muscles of the upper and forearm, especially in the flexors; also paralytic-like pains, extending along the nerves of the whole arm into the hand, alternately in both arms, at one time in the median, at another time in either the ulnar or radial nerve (ninth day after 60 drops), [11] . ► Uninterrupted, fine, sensitive pressure in the articular ligaments and periosteum of the arm from the shoulders to the fingers, which is like a drawing or tearing (nearly as severe during rest as during motion), from midnight on; this became worse later in the night, especially when lying on the back; best when lying upon the painful arm (after eight hours), [1] . ► Paralytic-like pressive sensation along the nerves of the arm, extending to the tips of the fingers (twelfth day after 60 drops), [11] . [990.] ► The pressive and tearing pains in the nerves of the arms and (as the prover again expresses it) along the vessels return (tenth day after 60 drops), [11] . ► Severe stitches in the arms along the bones, especially in the forearms, and also in the metacarpal bones; pains in the elbows, as after carrying a heavy weight with the arms bent, aggravated by extending the arms; these sensations, as all others, are worse on the right side (eighth day after 60 drops), [11] . ► Tearing pains appear in the muscles of the arms, especially in the flexors of the forearm, in the morning soon after waking (tenth day after 60 drops), [11] . ► The tearing pains in the arms are increased on the appearance of the cool evening air (ninth day after 60 drops), [11] . ► A crawling-tearing in the bones of the arm, extending into the fingers, as if the arm were numb or asleep, or had no sensation, [1] . ► Waked at night, with pricking numb sensation in right arm, transient (second day), [17] . ► Stitches extending through the right arm to the shoulder (twenty-eighth day), [14] . ► Left arm goes to sleep without having lain upon it, [2] . ► Shoulder. ► Transient pain in the right shoulder-joint, and at times in its vicinity, in the afternoon, [14] . ► Jerking stitches like electric sparks frequently in the left shoulder, and extending into the cervical muscles, [11] . [1000.] ► Slight stitches beneath the right axilla two or three times (third day), [14] . ► Arm. ► Pain in the right upper arm and in the shoulder-joint (tenth day), [14] . ► Bruised pain in the right upper arm along the biceps and brachialis anticus, increased by pressure (second day after 60 drops), [11] . ► Elbow. ► Drawing and paralytic pain in the elbows and hands, [1] . ► Pain in the elbow-joints below the internal condyle, just as if one had compressed the ulnar nerve, [11] . ► Pain in the right elbow (thirty-sixth day), [14] . ► Paralytic sensation in the right elbow-joint, as from hard pressure upon the ulnar nerve (fourth hour after 20 drops), [11] . ► Paralytic pressive sensation in the right elbow, in the region of the head of the radius and of the tendon of the biceps, extending thence to the middle of the upper arm (second hour after 5 drops), [11] . ► Stitches in the right elbow, [10] . ► Violent, rather persistent stitches and jerking-biting in the right elbow and along the whole ulnar side of the right forearm, during the whole forenoon (thirty-fourth day), [14] . [1010.] ► Transient sticking in the left elbow-joint, at noon (fourth day), [14] . ► Stitches in the left elbow (twelfth and thirtieth days), [14] . ► Repeated stitches on the outer side of the left elbow, in the afternoon (fourth day), [14] . ► Forearm. ► *The arms immediately go to sleep if she grasps anything firmly; she is obliged to left them sink down , [1] . ► Sensation along the ulnar arteries, right and left, as if they were too short, together with a pain, apparently in the ulnar artery, on bending the hand backward (second day after 5 drops), [11] . ► Frequent attacks of paralytic-like sensation, with pains in the forearms, as from firm pressure upon the ulnar nerve (eighth day after 60 drops), [11] . ► Paralytic-like pains in both forearms, extending to the palms of the hands, as from pressure upon the radial nerves (thirty minutes after 10 drops), [11] . ► Stiffness of the arm, as if it would go to sleep, when one grasps anything with the hand , [1] . ► Sensation in the "arteries" of the forearm, as if they were too short, with a spasmodic pain in them; this sensation was referred by the prover with a decided confidence to the arteries, and it seemed to him most severe in the radial arteries, and was noticed even in the smaller branches (thirty minutes after 20 drops), [11] . ► Paralytic-like pain extending along the ulna to the tip of the little finger (thirty minutes after 5 drops), [11] . [1020.] ► Drawing pain, late in the evening, in the inner portion of the arm, from the elbow to the tips of the fingers (after one hour), [1] . ► Dull sticking and drawing in the ulna, along the anterior and inner side of the forearm (ten minutes after 20 drops), [11] . ► Sensation in the right forearm, as if it were too short, and on bending the hand backward a pain, especially below the styloid process of the radius (this sensation the prover located in the arteries on the flexor surface of the arm); while sitting, a similar sensation in the popliteal artery (soon after 5 drops), [11] . ► Paralytic-like pain along the right radial nerve, especially noticed in the lower half of the forearm (fifty minutes after 5 drops), [11] . ► Sticking through the middle of the dorsal surface of the right forearm (second day), [14] . ► Stitches on the outer side of the upper half of the right forearm (sixth day), [14] . ► Stitches, with paralytic-like pains, extending from the right wrist to the middle of the forearm (fifteen minutes after 10 drops), [11] . ► Spasmodic sensation of the flexors of the left forearm, with a sensation as if they had gone to sleep, [10] . ► Pain in the left forearm just above the wrist (forty-seventh day), [14] . ► Wrist. ► Some pain in the right, and in a slight degree also in the left wrist (tenth day), [14] . [1030.] ► Drawing pain in the wrist, [1] . ► Stitches near the left wrist, and also in a slight degree in the right wrist (fourth day), [14] . ► Dull drawing stitches in the wrists, extending in part along the metacarpal bones into the hand, and in part along the inner surface of the radius (five hours after 60 drops), [11] . ► Stitches in the left wrist (twenty-first and twenty-fifth days), [14] . ► Hand. ► Veins on the back of the hand very much swollen, [14] . ► Drawing and dull stitches along the metacarpal bones of both hands, as well on the dorsal as on the volar surface, especially felt on the interosseous surface of these bones (thirty minutes after 10 drops), [11] . ► Stitches and paralytic sensation in the metacarpal bones (mostly of the right hand, and especially in the fourth and fifth metacarpal bones on the dorsal surface), (forty-five minutes after 40 drops), [11] . ► Stitches on the dorsal surface of the left hand, and a minute afterwards on the right also (seventh day), [14] . ► Burning pain in the hand, in the afternoon (after seventy-two hours), [1] . ► Stitches in the dorsal surface of the right hand (twenty-fourth day), [14] . [1040.] ► Pain in the left hand (fifth day), [14] . ► Sticking in the ball of the left hand (second day), [14] . ► Stitches in the ball of the left hand, at 10 P.M. (thirty-fourth day), [14] . ► Stitches on the inner margin of the left hand (thirteenth and fourteenth days), [14] . ► Stitches on the dorsal surface of the left hand between the thumb and index finger (fifth day), [14] . ► Fingers. ► The fingers go to sleep in the morning (after twelve hours), [1] . ► Pain in the thumb and index finger, as from a sprain or a strain, or from too great exertion, or as if it were broken; felt when moving it, [1] . ► Sticking in the flexor surface of the second phalanx of the right thumb (second day), [14] . ► Stitches in the right thumb (fifth and twenty-second days), [14] . ► Stitches in the metacarpal bone of the thumb, [10] . [1050.] ► Stitches about the first joint of the right thumb, in the afternoon, [14] . ► Stitches in the first joint of the right thumb (third and twelfth days), [14] . ► Severe stitches in the first phalanx of the right thumb, extending from the upper joint forward (third day after 60 drops), [11] . ► Moderate sticking-jerking in the first joint of the right thumb (fourth day), [14] . ► Stitches in the left thumb (twenty-third day), [14] . ► Stitches in the right index finger (twenty-fourth day), [14] . ► Stitches in the third joint of the right index finger (twenty-first day), [14] . ► Stitches in the third phalanx of the right index finger (twelfth day), [14] . ► Stitches between the left index finger and thumb, on the dorsal surface (fourth day), [14] . ► Pain in the tip of the left ring finger (sixth day), [14] . [1060.] ► Sticking in the right little finger (seventh day), [14] . ► Stitches in the left little finger (forty-fifth day), [14] . ► Rather sensitive stitches on the dorsal surface of the left little finger (twenty-first day), [14] . >>>>> Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Cham.

generalities.text:
GENERALITIES. ► Objective. ► *Convulsions of children now one leg, now another, is alternately moved up and down; the child grasps and reaches for something with the hands, and draws the mouth back and forth, with staring eyes, [1] . ► Twitches of the limbs and eyelids, [1] . ► Single twitches of the limbs and of the head during the morning nap, [1] . ► He is inclined to start up (after twenty-four hours), [1] . ► She starts up at slightest trifle, [1] . ► Tremulous starting up, [1] . ► Stretching of the whole body (second day), [9] . ► Inclination to stretch, [11] . [1200.] ► Great inclination to stretch (three hours after 5 drops), [11] . ► General stiffness for a short time, [1] . ► She sits stiff upon the chair like a statue; does not seem to notice anything about her (after twenty-four hours), [2] . ► *(Paroxysms, lasting some minutes, occur for two or three hours); the child becomes stiff and bends itself backwards, kicks with its feet when carried, screams immoderately, and throws everything off , [1] . ► He sits perfectly still, and will not talk if not obliged to answer a question (after six hours), [1] . ► The child will always lie; does not wish to be carried (after two hours), [1] . ► The child will neither stand nor walk, [1] . ► Weakness; she wishes to sit constantly (after five hours), [1] . ► Weakness in the morning, so that he cannot rise from bed, [1] . ► When the pain begins, it is accompanied by weakness, even to sinking down; he is obliged to lie down, [1] . [1210.] ► Great weakness while at rest, as also in motion, [1] . ► Great weakness and weariness (forty-five minutes after 5 drops), [11] . ► Great weakness and weariness, especially in the limbs, and for the most part in the lower limbs, [11] . ► Great weakness and weariness, especially in the legs, with inclination to stretch them (forty-five minutes after 5 drops), [11] . [These symptoms of fatigue affected in part even the exertion needed for making these observations.] ► The greatest weakness and weariness, which border on faintness (after four hours), [1] . ► Paralytic-like weakness of the parts affected by the pains, [11] . ► After rising in the morning, weaker and more fatigued than on lying down (second morning), [9] . ► During motion he has considerable strength, [1] . ► Exhaustion of the whole body (thirty minutes after 20 drops), [11] . ► Exhaustion of the whole body, especially of the limbs, and particularly of the knee-joints (fifteen minutes after 10 drops), [11] . [1220.] ► Attacks of exhaustion of the whole body (soon), [8] . ► Short attacks of exhaustion, especially of the lower extremities , [7] . ► Great exhaustion, especially of the limbs, [11] . ► Great exhaustion, complete inability for earnest thought, and a sensation as in the beginning of a severe illness, [9] . ► Sudden exhaustion, especially in the knees, while sitting and also while walking; slight giving way of the knees (thirty minutes after 5 drops), [11] . ► *A kind of faintness; he becomes sick and qualmish about the heart, the feet suddenly feel paralyzed, with heaviness of all the limbs, as if they were worn out , [1] . ► *Attacks of faintness , which return sooner or later (after half an hour and three, four, and five hours), [1] . ► Attacks of fainting, [1] . ► Great uneasiness, with inability to sit still (fifteen minutes after 5 drops), [11] . ► Weariness, with great fatigue, immediately after a little exertion (second day after 5 drops), [11] . [1230.] ► Weariness and weakness, [13] , [14] . ► Weariness, with weakness in the knees, [13] . ► Great weariness of the body (fourth day after 60 drops), [11] . ► Great general weariness, especially severe in the limbs, with frequent giving way of the knees, when walking at 7 A.M. Catarrh and hoarseness, with accumulation of tenacious mucus in the throat. Stitches and burning in the larynx, with hoarseness. Burning pain in the larynx. Spasmodic constriction in the gullet. Dry cough, produced by a constant titillation in the larynx, and under the sternum, chiefly in the evening, and at night in bed, continuing during sleep, and sometimes accompanied by a fit of suffocation. Cramps in the calves of the legs, chiefly at night. Tearing sensation, with a paralytic condition of the feet, at night. Cramp. Cracking of the knee during motion. Over-excitement, and excessive sensibility of the nervous system, with great sensibility to pain, which appears insupportable and induces despair. Over-sensitiveness of the senses (esp. from coffee and narcotics). Great sensibility in the open air, and principally to wind. The extremities feel, as it were, stiff and paralysed. Epileptic convulsions, with retraction of the thumbs, and foam before the mouth, preceded by colic, or followed by a lethargic state. Urgent inclination to remain lying down; a child will neither walk nor be carried in the arms. Cracking, and pain resembling a bruise, in the joints.

Burning and smarting or darting lacerating pain in ulcer, at night, with crawling and painful oversensitiveness to touch and air, particularly to wind. Redness and swelling of ulcers. Lancinating and darting in ulcers. "Proud flesh" in sensitive ulcers, with inflamed edges. Ulcers are aggravated : at night ; in open air ; during menstruation ; from motion of affected part ; by wet poultices ; by pressure on side of limb opposite to ulcer ; on rising from seat or bed ; from drinking coffee ; from heat of bed, and in windy weather. Ulcers are improved by cold. Pustulous pimples on face. Itching pimples covered with scurfs, and ulcerating around ulcer. Severe itching of sweating parts. Rhagades of skin. Skin yellow, jaundiced. Sequela of scarlatina. Chilblains. Pimples appear with itching around an ulcer, which is covered with a crust and suppurates, margin around base of ulcer very red. Inflammatory swelling of glands. Skin symptoms are aggravated : in evening and night ; when the child is kept too warm ; after taking cold ; after scarlet fever, during menstrual flow ; during pregnancy ; during perspiration, and after suppressed perspiration.

fever.text: FEVER. ► Chilliness. ► Frequent shivering-creeping over the whole body, and extending into the limbs, with increased secretion of urine; half an hour after the beginning of this cold stage (with a small weak pulse of 80, and respiration 16) a sensation of warmth was felt in the whole body, beginning in the head, while there were the shiverings in the body, and it was still cold to the touch; this warmth soon extended over the whole body; at 12 M. (after one hour), the skin was somewhat moist, pulse 76, respiration 16 (second day), [9] . ► He shivers in the cold air (after two hours), [1] . ► He shivers if he uncovers himself, [1] . ► (Chill all over, after eating, followed by heat in the cheeks), [1] . [1350.] ► Chill in the afternoon about 4 o'clock (during which he said things which he would not have said), with nausea in the abdomen, lasting until 11 P.M., followed by throbbing-sticking headache in the forehead, aggravated by lying down, [1] . ► Severe chill, immediately after uncovering in the bed, [2] . ► (Violent internal chill, without external coldness, except cold feet, with thirst, followed by excessive heat with sweat; but if she puts an arm out of bed chill, and if she covers it again in bed sweat, together with tearing in forehead), [1] . ► Chilliness (immediately); none of his clothing seems to be sufficiently warm, [1] . ► Chilliness in the evening; at night, much sweat and thirst, [1] . ► *Coldness over the whole body, with burning heat of the face , which comes out the eyes like fire , [1] . ► Coldness in the evening on lying down, a kind of deafness with it, with which sounds seem to come from a great distance; nausea, uneasiness, tossing about in bed; a kind of stupefaction of the head, with diminished sensation of the skin, so that the skin on scratching feels numb and dead, [1] . ► He is cold, together with thrills of shivering from the back to the abdomen (after one and four hours), [1] . ► On going to sleep, unpleasant cold sensation (second day), [17] . ► Shivering on single portions of the body which are not cold, with sleepiness (after two hours and a half), [1] . [1360.] ► *He has a shivering in some portions, in the face (after half an hour), on the arms (after two hours), with and without external coldness , [1] . ► *Shivering on the posterior portion of the body, of the arms, of the thighs, and of the back, which returns by paroxysms, without external coldness, but rather with internal dry heat and external heat, especially of the forehead and face , [1] . ► *Chill only on the anterior portion of the body (after a quarter of an hour), [1] . ► *Cold limbs, with burning heat of the face, burning heat in the eyes, and burning hot breath (after five hours), [1] . ► Icy coldness of the cheeks, hands, and feet, with burning heat on the forehead, neck, chest, afterwards again redness and heat on the right cheek; the hands and feet become again naturally warm, with contracted immovable pupils, followed by snoring sleep (after one and three hours), [1] . ► Sensation of coldness in the abdomen, especially in the region of the kidneys, extending thence over the whole back, and lasting a long time between the scapulæ; with this cold sensation there appeared severe stitches in the right frontal eminence, etc. (second day), [9] . ► At times a sensation of coldness in the epigastric region (second day), [10] . ► Cold sensation in the region of the kidneys, with frequent attacks of shivering, [11] . ► Shivering in the back, and bruised sensation in the peroneal muscles, at 6 P.M. (ninth day after 60 drops), [11] . ► Frequent shivering over the back (third day after 60 drops), [11] . [1370.] ► Frequent sensation of shivering along the back (seventh day after 60 drops), [11] . ► *Slight shiverings, alternating with heat, creep over the back and abdomen , [10] . ► Cold shiverings frequently creep over the back, [10] . ► Frequent cold shiverings in the back, especially in the lumbar vertebræ, from the time on waking in the morning till 9 o'clock (third day), [10] . ► Frequent creeping coldness in the back, at 11 A.M. (second day after 5 drops), [11] . ► Sensation of coldness in the dorsal vertebræ, from where frequent shiverings extend over the whole body (second day), [10] . ► Sensation of inner coldness in the lumbar region, with shivering over the whole body, [11] . ► Sensation of internal coldness, frequently returning, starting from the lumbar vertebræ, extending over the abdomen, with shivering along the spine, [11] . ► Coldness of the hands, with cold sweat on the palms, and warmth in the rest of the body (after two hours), [1] . ► The hands are cold; she feels a paralytic stiffness in them, with confusion of the head; she is sensitive to the open air, as if she would take cold easily, [1] . [1380.] ► *The fingers become cold and are inclined to become asleep, while sitting (after one hour), [1] . ► Cold feet, on going to sleep in the evening, [9] . ► Very cold feet (second day), [10] . ► (Febrile paroxysm; shaking chill in the afternoon; he was unable to get warm, with flow of saliva from the mouth, bruised pain in the back and in the side, with pressive dull headache in the forehead, followed by excessive heat at night, and loss of sleep), [1] . ► (Febrile paroxysm; during the chill he was obliged to lie down; thirst during the chill, but not during the heat; sweat followed the heat; sticking headache in the left half of the brain, only during sweat; the next morning a bitter taste in the mouth), [1] . ► Heat. ► Increased temperature of body (16 to 20 grains), [21] . ► The temperature of the axilla rose immediately from 36.3° to 36.4° Cent.; after six hours, at 1 P.M., 37.2°, [11] . ► The temperature of the axilla rose in half an hour from 36.3° to 36.4°; and then in forty-five minutes fell to 36.3° Cent., [11] . ► Heat of the whole body, [18] . ► *In the morning after drinking coffee, heat all over and sweat, with vomiting of bitter mucus, followed by bitter taste in the mouth, weakness in the head, and nausea , [1] . [1390.] ► At night, heat and restlessness, [17] . ► When lying on the back trying to sleep before midnight, heat, with general sweat (after six hours), [1] . ► Frequent flushes of heat over the whole body, [11] . ► General heat in the forenoon from 9 to 12, followed by profuse sweat, [2] . ► Increased heat, [22] . ► Great heat, especially in the right cheek (ten minutes after 5 drops), [11] . ► Severe heat at night, with loss of sleep (after twenty-four hours), [2] . ► He cannot endure the bed covering, on account of sensation of external heat, [1] . ► External heat, with shivering, [1] . ► *Internal heat with shivering , [1] . [1400.] ► Dry heat over the whole body (fifteen minutes after 5 drops), [11] . ► It causes a biting heat, [5] . ► A terrible feeling of heat, with burning, unquenchable thirst, dry tongue, and stupefaction, [2] . ► Sensation of heat, without external heat and without thirst, [1] . ► Sensation of external heat , without external heat (after one and three hours), [1] . ► *Constant alternations of heat and coldness in various parts; at one time the hands were cold, at another warm; at one time the lower leg, at another the thigh was cold, at another warm; at one time the forehead was cold and the cheeks hot, etc ., [2] . ► After forty minutes, the heat was relieved and alternated with a cold sensation; he was also more quiet mentally: slight cold shiverings between the shoulders (after 5 drops), [11] . ► *Burning heat often in lightly covered parts, though when not covered almost cold , [2] . ► *Heat in the head and face , [10] . ► *Heat creeping over the head and face continued a long time (ten minutes after 20 drops), [11] . [1410.] ► Heat, and some heaviness of the head, especially in the occiput (third day), [11] . ► Heat warm and confused (12 grains), [21] . ► Head hot (tenth day), [14] . ► Head hot and confused, [18] . ► Sensation of warmth in the head, flushes of rushing of blood to the head and face, [9] . ► Sensation of great warmth in the head, [9] . ► Sensation of heat in the head and face (thirty minutes after 40 drops), [11] . ► Sensation of violent dry heat in the head and face, with redness in the latter (soon after 60 drops), [11] . ► Great heat and rush of blood to head and chest, relieved as usual by expectoration, which appears immediately and very easily (second day after 10 drops), [11] . ► Transient flushes of dry heat over the head and trunk, [11] . [1420.] ► Ears hot (fourth day), [14] . ► Sensation of great heat and dryness in the nose, disappeared after some nosebleed of bright red blood (fifth day after 60 drops), [11] . ► Heat of the face, with redness of the cheeks, [2] . ► *Heat and sweat of the face, after eating and drinking (after fourteen hours), [1] . ► Flushes of heat in the face and head, followed by persistent sensation of warmth in the head, soon after taking, [11] . ► Burning, hot face, at 6 P.M. (fourth day), [14] . ► Sensation of heat in the face and head, [11] . ► Sensation of heat in the face and head, with transient rush of blood, with sensation as though sweat would break out, while the skin remained very dry, [9] . ► Glowing heat of the cheeks, with thirst, [1] . ► Repeated sensation as of heat rising up into the cheeks (after five minutes), [6] . [1430.] ► *Burning in the cheeks, with flying shiverings, in the evening , [1] . ► Hands very hot, [14] . ► Sensation of heat in the left foot, with breaking out of sweat, followed afterwards by general sweat, [10] . ► *Burning in the soles at night; he puts the feet out of bed, [1] . ► Sweat. ► Sweat, especially on the head below the temples, [1] . ► (General sweat in the morning, with biting sensation in the skin), [1] . ► General sweat at night, from 10 to 2 o'clock, without sleep, [1] . ► Continual sweat in consequence of great heat, in the morning (after 40 drops), [11] . ► Profuse sweat at night, with frequent waking; on waking the sweat ceases, and returns on falling asleep; heavy unpleasant dreams the whole night (third night), [7] . ► Sweats easily; sweat sour, [7] . [1440.] ► Perspiration easy, even on the slightest motion, with a very weary sensation (third day after 5 drops), [11] . ► The dry skin became moist and warm, and the feet began to sweat for the first time (half an hour after taking), [11] . ► *Profuse sweat on covered parts , [2] . ► Sweat on the face, throat, and hands (after six hours), [1] . ► Profuse transient sweat on the face and palms of the hands, [1] . ► Profuse sweating of the feet (as happened every summer); the feet easily become sore while walking, [14] . ► Very profuse sweat on the feet, [14] . CONDITIONS. ► Aggravation. ► ( Morning ), On rising, fretful, etc.; confusion of head; vertigo; at 7 o'clock especially on closing eyes, stupefaction of head; on rising from bed, vertigo ; at 5 o'clock, congestion to head;
